suite.name: Tc09
suite.source: C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Code\TS006_2_Updating the report status to Resolved\tc09.robot

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Update Status
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select' by value RESOLVED.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: document.evaluate("//button[normalize-space()='บันทึก']", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.click();
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Selected List Label
kw.msg: ${selected_label} = RESOLVED — แก้ไขแล้ว
kw.doc: Returns the label of selected option from selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Value
kw.msg: ${saved_note} = ดำเนินการแก้ไขเรียบร้อยแล้ว
kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.arg: ดำเนินการแก้ไขเรียบร้อยแล้ว

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
